backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining BlogPost and UserProfile types, with CRUD operations for blog posts and user profiles, access control via AccessControl/MixinAuthorization mixins, and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the fix for the 'Expected v3 response body' Candid interface mismatch error during blog post creation to the file `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts`.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing component purposes, recent fixes, and styling decisions across the AyurGlow Secrets app.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind directives and OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AyurGlow Secrets React app, setting metadata, theme color, and mounting the root div with the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that configures TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps admin-only routes in AdminRoute, and provides React Query and ThemeProvider context.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a centered access-denied message with a shield icon and a 'Go to Home' button for users lacking admin privileges.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Passthrough wrapper component for admin routes that currently renders children unconditionally without any access guard logic.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Sticky sidebar component for the blog showing a search widget with live results, a popular posts list with thumbnails, and a category count breakdown.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Renders a comment form and list for a given blog post, using React Query hooks to fetch and submit comments with loading states.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Displays a single featured blog post as a large image card with overlaid title, excerpt, metadata, and a link to the full post.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, quick links, category links, legal links, social media icons, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with the shared Navigation and Footer components in a full-height flex column layout.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, nav links, a categories dropdown, an admin link, and Internet Identity login/logout support.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Displays a blog post summary card with thumbnail image, category badge, title, excerpt, and author/date/read-time metadata.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A controlled search input with a clear button and keyboard event handlers (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown) forwarded via ref.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Dropdown list of search results with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape) that navigates to the selected result's route on selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via AuthClient and exposing identity, status flags, and login/clear functions to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on blog posts (fetch published, fetch all visible, fetch by ID/slug, create, update), each using the backend actor from useActor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Hook that filters a static list of Ayurvedic remedy pages by title, category, or keywords based on a search query string, returning matched results via useMemo.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including an AyurGlow-specific color palette.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page for AyurGlow Secrets displaying the platform's mission, philosophy, and offerings in styled card sections with icons.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that lists all blog posts with options to create, edit, delete, and toggle publish/unpublish state, using mutation hooks and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page that fetches and displays published posts in a grid with a sidebar, handling loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Detail page for a single blog post fetched by slug, rendering the article content with resolved image URLs, metadata, and a comment section.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating a new blog post with fields for title, slug, category, content, image upload, and publish state, requiring authentication.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Form page for editing an existing blog post, pre-populating fields from fetched post data and supporting image replacement, requiring authentication.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: A page displaying four natural/Ayurvedic remedies for dandruff and scalp care, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency, rendered as styled cards.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: A page presenting four Ayurvedic remedies to prevent or reverse premature greying, including curry leaf oil, amla-henna pack, black tea rinse, and bhringraj-brahmi oil, displayed as detail cards.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: A page listing four natural hair fall treatments (onion juice, fenugreek mask, amla-shikakai pack, curry leaves oil) with ingredients, steps, benefits, and frequency, shown as cards.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: A page showcasing four Ayurvedic hair growth remedies including castor oil blend, aloe vera-bhringraj mask, egg-yogurt treatment, and hibiscus-curry leaves pack, each detailed in a card layout.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: A page featuring five Ayurvedic hair oil and mask treatments (hot oil, brahmi-amla oil, banana-avocado mask, hibiscus-fenugreek mask, neem-tulsi oil) with full application details rendered as cards.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Static landing page for the Hair Care category displaying a hero section and a grid of subcategory cards linking to specific hair care topics.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: Displays a static page of four Ayurvedic remedies for diabetes and blood pressure management, each with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and frequency, along with a medical disclaimer banner.

A styled alternative page for diabetes and BP support remedies using Card components and a hero section with a back-navigation link, presenting four remedies with ingredients, preparation, benefits, and usage notes.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: Renders a styled page for digestion and gut health remedies using Card components and a hero section, listing four Ayurvedic remedies with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage guidance.
Displays a simpler static page of four Ayurvedic digestive health remedies with icons, ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency information in a card-based layout.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: Displays a page of four Ayurvedic immunity-boosting remedies (e.g., Turmeric Milk, Amla Juice) with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage, styled with a green hero section and card layout.
Presents four Ayurvedic immunity-boosting remedies with icons, ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency, rendered in a card layout with inline black color styles for text visibility.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: Renders a stress relief and sleep page with four Ayurvedic remedies (e.g., Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Chamomile-Lavender Blend) showing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a simple card grid.

A styled alternative stress and sleep solutions page featuring the same four remedies as StressSleepPage but with a purple-toned hero section, back-navigation link, and Card-based layout consistent with other remedy pages.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: Displays four Ayurvedic weight management remedies (e.g., Lemon-Honey Water, Ginger-Green Tea) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a minimal card layout.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Displays the Health Remedies landing page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic subcategory cards (immunity, digestion, weight management, diabetes/BP, stress/sleep), each linking to its respective route.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the AyurGlow Secrets home page with a full-screen hero, a 'What We Offer' feature grid, and sections for featured and recent blog posts fetched via the useGetPublishedPosts hook.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Static privacy policy page with a hero section and multiple cards covering data collection, usage, cookies, third-party services, and user rights for the AyurGlow Secrets website.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: Presents four natural acne and pimple remedies (e.g., Neem-Turmeric Face Pack, Tea Tree Oil Spot Treatment) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency, using a blue-toned hero section and card layout.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: Displays a page of four Ayurvedic acne treatment remedies (e.g., Neem-Turmeric Paste, Tea Tree-Aloe Spot Treatment), each showing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: Renders a page of four natural anti-aging remedies (e.g., Almond-Saffron Youth Serum, Avocado-Honey Mask), listing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and recommended frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: Presents five DIY face pack recipes categorized by skin type (e.g., Multani Mitti for oily skin, Oatmeal-Honey for sensitive skin), with ingredients, steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: Shows four Ayurvedic natural glow remedies (e.g., Turmeric-Yogurt Mask, Saffron-Milk Treatment), each with ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: Displays a page for treating pigmentation and dark spots with four natural remedies (e.g., Lemon-Honey Mask, Orange Peel-Yogurt Pack), including a hero section, ingredients, steps, benefits, and frequency.

React page displaying four natural Ayurvedic remedies for skin pigmentation reduction, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency. Includes a sun protection warning banner.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Displays the Skin Care landing page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic skin-care subcategory cards (natural glow, acne, pigmentation, anti-aging, DIY face packs), each linking to its route.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Static terms of service page featuring a medical disclaimer alert and multiple cards covering agreement terms, website use, intellectual property, and liability for AyurGlow Secrets.
frontend/src/utils/imageUtils.ts: Utility functions for handling ExternalBlob image URLs, including converting blobs to direct URLs, injecting data-blob-index attributes into HTML img tags, and replacing img src values with resolved blob URLs.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color tokens (using OKLCH CSS variables) for the AyurGlow palette, custom font families, border radii, and box shadows.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features, and configuration for a build focused on fixing a Candid interface mismatch error during blog post creation.
